The studio

We craft interiors that feel unmistakably yours

Insider is an independent interior design studio based in Dhaka. From first sketch and 3D visualization to turnkey fit-out, we shape residential and commercial spaces with craft, restraint, and a feel for how people actually live.

Interior Design●Space Planning●3D Visualization●Turnkey Fit-Out●Interior Design●Space Planning●3D Visualization●Turnkey Fit-Out●
10+
Years of craft
120+
Spaces delivered
60
Avg. days to finish
100%
Turnkey handover

Design with restraint. Built to last.

We believe great interiors aren't about doing more — they're about doing the right things beautifully. Every project starts by understanding how you live, then translating that into space, light, material and detail. We visualize it in 3D so there are no surprises, then deliver it turnkey.

Work with us
